title: Anti-Pattern Detection Flow
interaction_flow: Browser/DOM → scan(): DOMContentLoaded fires (or extension message {action:'scan'})
scan() → scan(): clear overlays[], reset visibilityObserver, overlayIndex=0
scan() → DOM: document.querySelectorAll('*') → NodeList of all elements
loop: for each el in NodeList (skip .impeccable-*, html/body):
scan() → checkElementBordersDOM(el): getComputedStyle(el) + getBoundingClientRect()
checkElementBordersDOM → checkBorders(tag, widths{Top/Right/Bottom/Left}, colors{sides}, radius): returns [{id, snippet}]
checkBorders → isNeutralColor(color): returns bool (transparent/achromatic check)
scan() → checkElementColorsDOM(el): getComputedStyle(el), extract directText, resolveBackground(el), resolveGradientStops(el)
checkElementColorsDOM → resolveBackground(el): walk parentElement chain, return solid {r,g,b,a} or null if gradient/url
checkElementColorsDOM → resolveGradientStops(el): walk parents, parse gradient stops via parseGradientColors(bgImage)
checkElementColorsDOM → checkColors({tag, textColor, bgColor, effectiveBg, effectiveBgStops, fontSize, fontWeight, hasDirectText, isEmojiOnly, bgClip, bgImage, classList})
checkColors → parseRgb(color): CSS color string → {r,g,b,a}
checkColors → relativeLuminance({r,g,b}): WCAG luminance calc
checkColors → contrastRatio(c1, c2): returns float ratio
checkColors → hasChroma(c, threshold=30): max-min channel diff check
checkColors → getHue(c): HSL hue 0-360
checkColors → isEmojiOnlyText(text): regex emoji-only check
scan() → checkElementMotionDOM(el): getComputedStyle(el)
checkElementMotionDOM → checkMotion({tag, transitionProperty, animationName, timingFunctions, classList}): bounce/elastic detection
scan() → checkElementGlowDOM(el): getComputedStyle(el), resolveBackground(el.parentElement)
checkElementGlowDOM → parseGradientColors(bgImage): walk ancestor chain if no solid bg, average gradient stops
checkElementGlowDOM → checkGlow({tag, boxShadow, effectiveBg}): dark-glow detection
scan() → checkElementAIPaletteDOM(el): getComputedStyle(el), parseGradientColors(bgImage), getHue(c), relativeLuminance()
scan() → checkElementIconTileDOM(el): el.previousElementSibling, getBoundingClientRect() x2, getComputedStyle(sibling)
checkElementIconTileDOM → checkIconTile({headingTag, headingText, siblingWidth, siblingHeight, siblingBorderRadius, hasIconChild, ...})
scan() → checkElementQualityDOM(el): getComputedStyle(el), getBoundingClientRect(), resolveFontSizePx(el)
checkElementQualityDOM → checkQuality({el, tag, style, hasDirectText, textLen, fontSize, lineHeightPx, letterSpacingPx, rect, lineMax})
scan(): merge all findings[], filter by _ruleOk(id) (disabled rules list from config)
scan() → highlight(el, findings): create DOM overlay element, push to overlays[]
scan(): allFindings.push({el, findings})
end loop
scan() → checkTypography(): page-level font/size checks → pageLevelFindings
scan() → checkLayout(): page-level layout checks (nested-cards, everything-centered, monotonous-spacing) → layoutFindings
scan() → checkPageQualityDOM(): checkPageQualityFromDoc(document) → skipped-heading findings
scan() → checkHtmlPatterns(document.documentElement.outerHTML): regex-based HTML scan
scan() → showPageBanner(pageLevelFindings): render top-of-page banner if page-level issues
alt EXTENSION_MODE:
scan() → window.postMessage({source:'impeccable-results', findings:serializeFindings(allFindings), count})
serializeFindings → ANTIPATTERNS.find(a => a.id === type): enrich with name/description/category
serializeFindings → generateSelector(el): CSS selector for DevTools
serializeFindings → isElementHidden(el): el.checkVisibility() or offsetWidth/offsetHeight
else:
scan() → printSummary(allFindings): console.group with styled output
Browser/DOM → scan(): window.impeccableScan() exposed for manual re-scan

pure_detection_helpers.parseGradientColors(bgImage): Regex-extracts rgba?() and #hex color stops from CSS gradient string; returns [{r,g,b,a}]
pure_detection_helpers.isNeutralColor(color): Returns true for transparent/achromatic; supports rgb, oklch, lch, oklab, lab, hsl, hwb formats
pure_detection_helpers.parseRgb(color): Parses CSS rgb/rgba string to {r,g,b,a}; returns null if unrecognized
pure_detection_helpers.checkBorders(tag, widths, colors, radius: Detects side-tab (left/right border ≥2px, non-neutral color, dominant) and border-accent-on-rounded (top/bottom border + radius). Skips BORDER_SAFE_TAGS (all SAFE_TAGS except label)
pure_detection_helpers.checkColors(opts): Detects: pure-black-white bg, gray-on-color, low-contrast (WCAG AA: 4.5:1 normal, 3:1 large), gradient-text (bgClip=text + gradient), ai-color-palette (purple hue 260-310 or cyan 160-200)
pure_detection_helpers.checkMotion(opts): Detects bounce-easing via animationName regex /bounce|elastic|wobble|jiggle|spring/ and animate-bounce class
pure_detection_helpers.checkGlow(opts): Detects dark-glow: boxShadow on dark background (relativeLuminance < 0.1)
pure_detection_helpers.checkIconTile(opts): Detects icon-tile anti-pattern: square sibling (32-128px) before heading with icon child/emoji, visible bg or border, not circular
pure_detection_helpers.resolveBackground(el): Walks parentElement chain for solid bg color; returns null if gradient/url encountered; falls back to white
pure_detection_helpers.resolveGradientStops(el): Walks parents for gradient bgImage; returns parsed color stops via parseGradientColors()

key_data_structures.ANTIPATTERNS: Array of {id, category('slop'|'quality'), name, description, skillSection, skillGuideline}
key_data_structures.finding: {id, snippet} from pure detectors; normalized to {type, detail} in scan loop
key_data_structures.serializedFinding: {type, category, detail, name, description} — enriched via ANTIPATTERNS.find()
key_data_structures.allFindings: [{el, findings[]}] accumulated across entire DOM walk
key_data_structures.mockStyle (test): Plain object with borderTopWidth/Color, borderRadius, etc. simulating CSSStyleDeclaration

important_notes: IS_BROWSER=true hardcoded (generated file). Node path uses jsdom and different adapter functions (checkElementBorders, checkElementColors, etc. — no DOM suffix)
BORDER_SAFE_TAGS = SAFE_TAGS minus 'label' (label re-enabled for side-tab detection)
Element visibility: skip if rect.width<20||rect.height<20 for borders; <10x10 for colors
Gradient background handling: resolveBackground() returns null for gradients; callers fall back to resolveGradientStops() for worst-case contrast
jsdom workaround: var() in border colors left unresolved; overrides parameter fills in pre-resolved values
